content.name: [VAS] Bulk Crew Promotion
content.description: Adds right-click actions to bulk-promote the best available crew members to pilot / captain. Two scopes: on the currently selected player ships, on every player ship empire-wide. Plus an empire-wide reshuffle that pulls the best service / marine / unassigned crew from across the empire and moves them to fill the captain slots.
content.author: VasiliyTemniy
